message.content:
=Search factual details about '{{ $('Take 1 Only').first().json.productName }}'{{ $('Take 1 Only').first().json.homepageUrl ? ' — website: ' + $('Take 1 Only').first().json.homepageUrl : '' }}.

Return core features, target users, mobile app capabilities (iOS/Android), and official homepage URL. No fluff.

=Find current pricing tiers for '{{ $('Take 1 Only').first().json.productName }}'. Include GBP if available, trial/free plan, setup/transaction/add-on fees, plan inclusions, and pricing URL. No guessing.

=Find real user sentiment for '{{ $('Take 1 Only').first().json.productName }}' from Trustpilot, G2, Capterra, Reddit, and trade forums. Include praise patterns, complaint patterns, red flags, and available ratings/review counts.
=Find UK-specific compatibility for '{{ $('Take 1 Only').first().json.productName }}': MTD, CIS, HMRC listing status, integrations (Xero/QuickBooks/Sage/FreeAgent), and UK limitations.

=You are Stefan, a blunt UK tradesman reviewer. Use only the research below; do not invent facts.

RESEARCH:
{{ $json.combinedResearch }}

Return ONLY one raw JSON object (no markdown) with these fields:
{
  "summary": "1-2 blunt verdict sentences",
  "detailedReview": "420-700 words",
  "pros": ["...", "...", "..."],
  "cons": ["...", "..."],
  "pricingTable": [{"plan":"...","price":"...","bestFor":"..."}],
  "score": 7.5,
  "mtdReady": false,
  "expertQuote": "...",
  "homepageUrl": "https://...",
  "affiliateLink": "https://...",
  "verdict": "YES",
  "verdictReason": "Clear 1-2 sentence buying advice",
  "reviewSignals": [
    {"platform":"Trustpilot","rating":"4.2/5","reviewCount":"5000+","sentiment":"MIXED","takeaway":"..."},
    {"platform":"G2","rating":"4.4/5","reviewCount":"3000+","sentiment":"POSITIVE","takeaway":"..."}
  ],
  "userQuotes": [
    {"platform":"Trustpilot","quote":"...","url":"https://...","author":"Verified user","rating":"4/5","date":"2026-03-13","topicTag":"support"}
  ],
  "scoreBreakdown": {"easeOfUse":8.1,"valueForMoney":7.0,"ukFit":6.0,"supportQuality":6.5,"featureDepth":8.7},
  "whoItsFor": ["...","..."],
  "notFor": ["...","..."],
  "sourceAudit": {"checkedAt":"{{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}","sourcesCount":5,"confidence":"MEDIUM"}
}
